name: Day Trip: Casablanca from Marrakech

seo.title: Casablanca Day Trip from Marrakech — Hassan II Mosque, Corniche | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private day trip from Marrakech to Casablanca: Hassan II Mosque (3rd largest in the world), Art Deco district, old medina, Corniche. Round trip included.

hero.tagline: Casablanca & the Hassan II Mosque from Marrakech

intro: Casablanca, Morocco's economic capital, is home to the Hassan II Mosque — the third largest mosque in the world, its 210-metre minaret overlooking the Atlantic. This day trip from Marrakech lets you discover Morocco's modern metropolis, its unique Art Deco district, its old medina and its Corniche.
